name: Streptococcus pneumoniae type 10a capsular polysaccharide antigen
description: Streptococcus pneumoniae type 10a capsular polysaccharide antigen is a vaccine that contains highly purified capsular polysaccharides from the invasive pneumococcal type 10a of *Streptococcus pneumoniae*. It is an active immunization for intramuscular or subcutaneous injection against pneumococcal disease such as pneumococcal pneumonia and pneumococcal bacteremia.
